e2e/tests/pr-core.spec.ts.notes: Four-scenario PR core passed more than three consecutive local Chromium runs on 2026-07-11 (recorded examples: 11.4s, 11.5s, 11.6s, 11.8s, 12.0s, and 12.3s), followed by more than three successful post-fix GitHub Actions runs. The repository ruleset requires the e2e-pr-core check.

e2e/tests/runtime-local-canary.spec.ts.notes: Runtime prerequisite, cleanup, Docker, selector, and final-status polling contracts pass. The first scheduled Linux run built the image but exposed a final-read polling defect; that defect was fixed by PR #2 and has regression coverage. A successful clean Linux Docker run is still pending.
